findings.description: William Hubert Ferber died on 11 March 1903 at Cincinnati, Hamilton County, Ohio. His death is documented by an Ohio county death record — which also names his parents, Gerhard and Eva Ferber, confirming identity — and by a FamilySearch Find a Grave memorial, both recoverable via record_search.
supporting_sources: Ohio, County Death Records, 1840-2001 — Wm. Ferber, died 11 Mar 1903 at Cincinnati, Hamilton, Ohio (parents Gerhard and Eva Ferber).
Find a Grave Index — William H Ferber, died 11 Mar 1903, Cincinnati, Hamilton, Ohio.

findings.description: William Hubert Ferber was buried at Spring Grove Cemetery, Cincinnati, Hamilton County, Ohio. The FamilySearch Find a Grave memorial supports the burial locale (Cincinnati); the specific cemetery name, Spring Grove, comes from an off-FamilySearch cemetery index, so it is scored as bonus credit rather than required.

details.place: Spring Grove Cemetery, Cincinnati, Hamilton, Ohio, United States

supporting_sources: Find a Grave Index — burial at Cincinnati, Hamilton, Ohio.
Cincinnati, Ohio, Spring Grove Cemetery Index, 1845-2012 (off-FamilySearch) — Spring Grove Cemetery, Cincinnati.
